description_long: This house is a multi-story residential building with a modern, urban design, featuring three levels of living space. The exterior is clad in gray brickwork, with prominent balconies on both sides of the building, each protected by white railings. The front facade showcases a large, angular bay window section spanning all three stories, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house is more utilitarian, with minimal window openings and a flat wall surface. The interior layout is partially visible, revealing open-plan living areas, bedrooms, and modern furnishings. The roof is flat, suitable for potential rooftop use or utilities.
description: A modern, three-story urban house with gray brick exterior, multiple balconies, and a striking bay window facade. The design features a flat roof and open, light-filled interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main balconies, white railings, and partial interior layout with visible furnishings.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain gray brick wall, minimal windows, and no balconies visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, mirroring the main balconies and open interiors, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the large, angular bay window section spanning all three stories and the main entrance below.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with prominent bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door set within a large bay window section, no porch or steps, and minimal decorative elements.
